reason: Replace duplicated inline tables with one reviewed engine; enforce the resident KSh 24,000 aggregate monthly threshold for fee rows; preserve the detailed KRA table's 20% winnings rate; and fail closed for unsupported combinations or unverified EAC, treaty, and exemption treatment.
sourceConflict: Current KRA pages conflict on some simplified table rows and remittance wording. In particular, the detailed KRA table and current Income Tax Act show winnings at 20%, while the newer simplified KRA explainer shows 5%. The engine retains the primary-law-aligned 20% row and discloses the conflict. Current KRA guidance says remit within five working days; the UI also tells users to confirm the live iTax obligation because older KRA content says the 20th of the following month.
